info.name: Admin API
info.description: Complete Admin API collection for dating app backend

request.description: Admin login endpoint. Returns JWT token for authentication.
Get current admin profile. Requires JWT token in Authorization header.
Get comprehensive dashboard statistics.
Get all users with pagination and filters.
Get specific user details.
Update user status (active, banned, suspended).
Ban a user.
Unban a user.
Ban multiple users.
Unban multiple users.
Get all verification requests with pagination and filters.
Get specific verification request details.
Approve a verification request.
Reject a verification request.
Get all reports with pagination and filters.
Get specific report details.
Process a report and take action.
Get reports summary and statistics.
Process multiple reports and take action.
Get all banned users with pagination and filters.
Get specific ban details.
Get all business profile requests with pagination and filters.
Get specific business profile request details.
Approve a business profile request.
Reject a business profile request.
Get all transactions with pagination and filters.
Process a refund for a transaction.
Get all subscription plans with filters.
Create a new subscription plan.
Update an existing subscription plan.
Delete a subscription plan (soft delete).
Get statistics for a specific subscription plan.
Get all media with pagination and filters for moderation.
Get detailed information about a specific media item.
Update the moderation status of a media item.
Soft delete a media item.
Get all albums with pagination and filters.
Get detailed information about a specific album.
Moderate an album (approve, hide, or delete).
Soft delete an album.
Get all groups with pagination and filters.
Get detailed information about a specific group.
Update the status of a group.
Soft delete a group.
Get all members of a specific group.
Get all posts from a specific group.
Get all chatrooms with pagination and filters.
Get detailed information about a specific chatroom.
Update the status of a chatroom.
Soft delete a chatroom.
Get all messages from a specific chatroom.
Get all participants of a specific chatroom.
Remove a participant from a chatroom.
Ban a user from a chatroom (temporary or permanent).
Get all banned users from a chatroom.
Unban a user from a chatroom.
Get all conversations (direct, group, public) for monitoring.
Get all messages from a specific conversation.
Get message activity statistics and recent conversations.
Moderate a conversation (mark as moderated or remove moderation).
Delete a specific message from a conversation.
Hide a message from users (admin action).
